title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released the TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, with the latter served via the Virgo Network to enable high throughput. The video compares Google's ASIC TPUs to NVIDIA's general-purpose GPUs and discusses scaling strategies affecting token economics and LLM serving costs.
